refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements, and manage their updates and history.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the original FR into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional responsibilities and supports traceability and calibration history requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs, and by reviewing history logs of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates and maintain history of performance requirements

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine with data input adapters
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated derivation and management system combining algorithmic engine with version-controlled database

potential_sources: Data input adapters coupling with mission context sources
Database coupling with update management logic
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups derivation, recording, and management to minimize cross-module dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable and consistent mission context data inputs
Risk of complexity in integrating derivation algorithms with version control
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor integration complexity; consider modularizing if coupling increases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Complete system-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data inputs for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to operational planning modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and updates with external systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this is a core system function; low diffusion risk due to centralized management.
Low containment; performance requirement derivation is not vehicle-specific but vehicle may consume outputs.
Minimal containment; teleoperation uses performance targets but does not derive or manage them.
Negligible containment; safety services may receive alerts but do not handle performance requirements.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if too many functions are combined
Risk of interface overload on Telemetry and Network Link
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity; consider interface partitioning or submodules if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical grouping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification through documented traceability and history logs is feasible within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review interface load on Telemetry and Network Link for potential bottlenecks
Consider modular sub-division within NGHE Solution if complexity grows

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet requirements with acceptable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates and maintain history of performance requirements

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; monitor complexity and interface load in future iterations.

assumptions: Mission context data is reliable and accessible
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated DP complexity
open_risks: Potential interface overload on Telemetry and Network Link
Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Performance logs demonstrating traceability and update history
